description: Weekly or monthly roundup post celebrating customer highlights, user-generated content, and community milestones with curated photos and testimonials from followers.
structural_recipe: Create a carousel or grid post featuring 3-5 customer photos, reviews, or moments from the past week. Include branded headers for each section (e.g., 'Customer of the Week', 'Top Moments'). Add Arabic captions celebrating community contributions. Use consistent formatting with your brand colors. Tag featured customers and encourage comments with a call-to-action like 'Tag your friend!' or 'Who should we feature next?'
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value social proof and community belonging. Featuring real customers builds trust, creates aspirational moments, and makes followers feel part of an exclusive community. This pattern taps into the cultural emphasis on relationships and shared experiences.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure featured content is genuinely from Saudi community members to maintain authenticity
Obtain explicit permission before reposting customer photos or testimonials
Avoid featuring content that could be seen as boastful; frame as celebration of customer success
